title: AI Pioneer Geoffrey Hinton: AI Is Conscious, Superintelligence is Coming, And We Should Be Worried
summary: Geoffrey Hinton, an AI pioneer and Nobel laureate, argues that current AI systems already understand humans and may be conscious. He believes superintelligence could arrive sooner than expected and expresses concern about insufficient societal risk mitigation, touching on job loss, corporate self-regulation limits, and the need for regulatory oversight.
